model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time ~ treatment + C(year) + C(statefip)", data=sample, weights=sample["perwt"]).fit()
sample_selection: Mexican-origin noncitizens (hispan == 1, bpl == 200, citizen == 3) aged 18-34 with yrimmig > 0 and perwt > 0
plausible arrival age (imm_age >= 0) and usual hours recorded between 0 and 96
